utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination is provided with a clear location (Lisbon, Portugal) — fully specified; (2) travel_dates are given with specific start and end dates — fully specified; (3) transportation includes flight details (airline, class, baggage, round-trip, cost, currency) — fully specified; (4) accommodation includes name, type, rating, room type, amenities, location, cost, and currency — fully specified; (5) activities are listed with names, types, durations, costs, and currency — fully specified; (6) additional_services include dining details with type, cuisines, accommodations, style, cost, currency — fully specified; (7) total_budget includes a complete breakdown of all categories and total cost with currency — fully specified. Therefore, all 7 items are covered completely.
